name: kamalaharris.org
subject: Real quick
body:
Real quick --

A $5
contribution to Kamala’s historic campaign for president is so much more
than a number.

It sends a strong message that we reject a political system that
prioritizes wealthy corporations and seven-figure checks over the support
of a teacher from Iowa, a mom from Ohio, or an ironworker in Illinois.

A $5
contribution is an investment in big, bold ideas for the future of our
country, like the following plans from Kamala:

* For the first time in American history, we can require corporations to
show they’re not engaging in pay discrimination, and fine companies
that fail to close their pay gaps -- holding corporations accountable
for paying women less than men for equal work.
* Enacting gun safety reform that will mandate near-universal background
checks, revoke the licenses of gun manufacturers and dealers that
break the law, closes the “boyfriend loophole,” and bans the
importation of AR-15-style assault weapons.
* Closing the teacher pay gap by making the largest federal investment
in teacher pay in U.S. history, providing the average public school
teacher a $13,500 raise.

A $5
contribution means the difference between having the resources we need to
organize in critical states or cutting back our investments and
jeopardizing our momentum.

Your donation, whatever you can give, is powerful. It helps us amplify our
message to every corner of the country. With that in mind, can Kamala
count on you to add a donation to
our campaign and help us reach our end-of-month goal by midnight Friday?

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Thank you for joining our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Friend,
First, thank you for joining our campaign for U.S. Senate.
I came to the United States as a refugee fleeing the Liberian civil war 25 years ago.
Every day since then has been a renewed reminder for me that we all live in the greatest country on earth. This country gave my family an amazing life, which is why I wake up every morning finding new ways to serve and exemplify my eternal gratitude for this great nation.
This is what led me, my wife, and my daughter to proudly serve in the U.S. military. It's what led me to work with underprivileged children and families to provide them the opportunity that was given to me 25 years ago. It's what led me to serve as mayor of Helena, Montana. Now, it's why I'm running to serve as Montana's next United States Senator.
[**I 'm grateful to have you by my side on this journey. Will you take the next step and contribute $5 now toward our campaign for U.S. Senate?**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-welcome?source=welcome&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
For far too long, Montana has been represented in Washington by politicians -- not public servants. It's time we restore the real and true meaning behind public service and do away with those only interested in lining their pockets and playing political games in D.C.
Now, I know there are folks out there who will wonder about the improbable journey we are embarking on here today. Pundits will question the feasibility of this candidacy.
But what they fail to realize is that this is not a campaign about me, this campaign is about all of us.
I'm asking you to join me in leading a movement to remind the rest of this great country about our forgotten promise -- of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness -- to believe that no matter how divided we become, that under one big sky, with fire in our hearts, and passion in our souls, we still can reach for that now distant promise.
[**Together, we are one people. Our voices roar louder than ever before. And starting right now, we 've got some work to do. Contribute $5 to say you're with me.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-welcome?source=welcome&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
I'm so excited to share this journey with you,
Wilmot

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164731/1e3760f0/699a45ed/5f7ebc88/3219979462/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164731/1e3760f0/699a45ed/5f7ebc89/3219979462/VEsC/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164731/1e3760f0/699a45ed/5f7ebc86/3219979462/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

subject: Beto’s honesty, care, and thoughtfulness were on full display
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Beto’s strengths were on full display at this week’s CNN town hall. It was
amazing to see, and everyone was impressed with how much honesty, care,
and thoughtfulness he addressed each question. In case you missed it, we
put together the highlights:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17602?t=1001&akid=32842%2E444211%2EoXDtS2 ]Watch and share the recap video on Facebook from Beto’s first
nationally-televised town hall since launching our campaign for president.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17602?t=1002&akid=32842%2E444211%2EoXDtS2 ]CNN recap video

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17602?t=1003&akid=32842%2E444211%2EoXDtS2 ]Facebook »
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17603?t=1004&akid=32842%2E444211%2EoXDtS2 ]Twitter »

* Beto laid out a plan to protect and expand reproductive rights by
mobilizing the full power of every branch of government.
* He called for rewriting our immigration laws to reflect the best
shared values and interests of our country, comprised of immigrants,
asylum seekers, and refugees.
* He addressed the urgent threat of climate change with a $5 trillion
plan to defend communities and achieve net-zero emissions.
* He explained the quickest, surest path to guarantee universal,
high-quality health care for every American -- with no exception.
* He lifted up the voices and concerns of farmers bearing the brunt of
Trump’s disastrous trade war.
* He shared six ways to reform the justice system -- including ending
for-profit prisons, because no one should get rich for locking people
up.
* He condemned Trump’s hateful rhetoric: “The president does not just
offend our ears or sensibilities. He makes possible the acts of
violence and hatred we’re seeing play out in this country today.”

And so much more. This is the kind of heart, humanity, and real democracy
that we’re bringing back to politics -- but we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17602?t=1005&akid=32842%2E444211%2EoXDtS2 ]Please take a few minutes to watch and share the recap video so that
more people can hear Beto’s message.

Thank you for being in this together,

Team Beto

body:
Do you think I deserve to share my unique story and vision in the debates? >> | | |
---
| |
---
| | | This is the most important question I've ever asked you: The threshold for future Democratic debates is going to be even tougher. **Do you think I deserve to share my unique story and vision in the debates?** **[_YES >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd29/3eb3e2fc/4f918d5d/74499a70/1859449225/VEsH/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190526_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs") [_NO >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd29/3eb3e2fc/4f918d5d/74499a70/1859449225/VEsE/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190526_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")**
---

People who grew up where I did...

Who were raised by single moms like I was...

Who come from a family of immigrants like I do...

We're not expected to run for President -- and we're certainly not expected to be frontrunners.

**But I want kids from all walks of life to know that -- no matter where you come from -- you can be President, too.**

Which is why sharing my story and vision in every Democratic debate is so personally important to me.

[_**But the threshold to qualify for future debates is going to be even tougher than the first two. Will you take my quick poll if you think I deserve to share my unique story on that national stage? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd29/3eb3e2fc/4f918d5d/74499a70/1859449225/VEsF/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20190526_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs")

Thank you,

Julian Castro

body:
#
Team,
Americans deserve to be represented by Senators who will protect our rights: healthcare, public lands, clean air and water, privacy and freedom. Fighting for your rights is what I will do every day as a United States Senator.
I've learned as mayor of Helena that solving the problems we face isn't about me and my voice -- it's about what we can achieve together. If we meet in person and listen to each other then together, only together, can we preserve our rights.
[**Team, this campaign is about all of us, together, fighting for the American dream. It will be a team effort and that 's why I'm counting on you. Can you chip in $5 today to give our campaign the strongest possible start?**](https://act.wilmotcollins. But this campaign isn't about me. This campaign is about all of us.
This campaign is about nurses like my wife Maddie. Military service members like my daughter Jaymie. Teachers and small business owners and working families everywhere.
I promise to show up and listen. I promise to stand up for working families in the halls of power and I will always fight for you.
[**Are you with me? Contribute $5 right now to fight for the opportunity we deserve.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190526&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Wilmot
